Our Story

The Heart of Celebrations on Waghodia Road

Since 2001, Radhika Bhuvan has been where Vadodara's happiest memories are made.

For 25 proud years, we have hosted more than 1000 happy weddings and countless joyful occasions, earning a 4.6-star Google rating from over 2,500 reviews, the highest on Waghodia Road and among the Top 10 banquet venues in Vadodara.

As one of the oldest and most trusted names in the area, we believe every celebration deserves perfection. From grand weddings to intimate family functions, our elegant halls, warm hospitality and attention to every little detail make each event unforgettable.

At Radhika Bhuvan, you do not simply book a venue. You become part of our family.

Our Journey

Twenty-Five Years of Growing With You

2001

Where It All Began

A single ground-floor hall and one big dream: to give every family a beautiful place to celebrate.

2015

A New Home Rises

We built our new multi-storey banquet building, a proud moment for our whole family.

2018

Expansion & New Facilities

New halls, modern amenities and comfortable guest rooms for our growing family of guests.

2026

Radhika Bhuvan Today

Three elegant halls, a conference hall, our own disco floor and 15 guest rooms. Twenty-five years strong.

The Founders' Story

A Legacy Built from the Ground Up

In 2001, we opened a single ground-floor hall with one belief: every family deserves a beautiful place to celebrate. Miraben stood at the heart of every occasion, caring for each celebration as her own, and every family who walked in was welcomed not as a customer, but as a guest in our home.

From that one hall rose a five-storey building. Then came grander halls, guest rooms, and thousands of beautiful memories. Yet our true luxury has never been the height of the building. It is the heart behind it. Every bride is welcomed like a daughter. Every celebration is cared for like our own.

We did not simply build a banquet hall. We built trust, one family at a time, and a legacy that continues to rise.

Miraben & Ramprasad KanojiyaFounders, Radhika Bhuvan
Celebrate

Our Venues & Facilities

Three Halls. Fifteen Rooms. One Family.

Grand Hall

Our largest hall for grand weddings and receptions.

Royal Hall

Elegant stage décor for engagements and functions.

Celebration Hall

Bright and joyful, ideal for birthdays and family events.

Conference Hall

Projector, screen and seating for corporate events and meetings.

Disco Floor

In-house disco with professional lighting and sound. Celebrate all night!

15 Guest Rooms

Comfortable air-conditioned stays for wedding families and outstation guests.

Facilities & Amenities

Everything Your Celebration Needs

Fire Safety

Fully equipped with fire safety systems for complete peace of mind.

Ample Parking

Spacious parking so your guests arrive without any hassle.

Lift Facility

Elevators to every floor for elderly guests and easy movement.

Security

Trained security staff so your family celebrates without worry.

Multi-Cuisine Catering

Delicious Gujarati, Punjabi, Chinese and many more cuisines, prepared in-house.

Sound System

Professional indoor sound and lighting for every function.

Indoor Decoration

Beautiful stage and hall decoration, customised to your occasion.

Vendor Arrangements

Photographers, mehndi artists, DJs and more, all arranged by our team.

Our Promise

"Just come. We will handle every single thing, from the photographer to every vendor."

How To Reach Us

Easy To Find, Close To Everything

Railway Station

Vadodara Railway Station: approx. 7 km (about 20 minutes)

Airport

Vadodara Airport (Harni): approx. 6 km (about 15 minutes)

Hospitals Nearby

Multiple hospitals on Waghodia Road within minutes; SSG Hospital approx. 7 km

Historical Sites

Laxmi Vilas Palace approx. 5 km · EME Temple approx. 7 km · Champaner-Pavagadh (UNESCO)

Parks & Gardens

Sayaji Baug (Kamati Baug): approx. 6 km (about 18 minutes)
